top_signals.title: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
top_signals.summary: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft announced a series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Glencore’s Cerrejon shutdown deepens pressure on Colombia coal
top_signals.summary: Community blockade halts Glencore mine as investors bet election could reshape Colombia's resource sector.
